annual_rate.notes: Prejudgment interest under Cal. Civ. Code sec. 3287 — 10% (simple interest). This is PREjudgment interest (accruing before entry of judgment) and is separate from California’s post-judgment rate; availability is limited by claim type (see the page). Current formula value as of 2026-07-09; verify at leginfo.legislature.ca.gov. Not legal advice.
